scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'echo "[preinstall] PAT length: ${#CARD_SCHEMA_READ_PAT}"; if [ -n "$CARD_SCHEMA_READ_PAT" ]; then git config --global --add url."https://x-access-token:$CARD_SCHEMA_READ_PAT@github.com/".insteadOf "https://github.com/"; git config --global --add url."https://x-access-token:$CARD_SCHEMA_READ_PAT@github.com/".insteadOf "ssh://git@github.com/"; git config --global --add url."https://x-access-token:$CARD_SCHEMA_READ_PAT@github.com/".insteadOf "git@github.com:"; else echo "[preinstall] WARNING: CARD_SCHEMA_READ_PAT is not set — private @cardixx/card-schema dep will fail to install. Set it as an env var with a GitHub PAT (Contents: read)."; fi'
